name: CustomGraphLayout
summary: Base contract a graph layout implements — layout(spec) consuming a semantic GraphSpec and returning a PositionedGraph (node coordinates + optional edge waypoints + bounds), declaring its LayoutStrategy family and whether it is deterministic. Satisfied by the native-first deterministic layered-DAG default (Frontier UI's canonical impl) and by every adapter (ELK/dagre, D3-force, Cytoscape). The spec is the only lock: swapping impls leaves the GraphSpec untouched.
